title: gerascanthus gardneri
side_effects: Gerascanthus gardneri can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to cardiac problems, such as irregular heartbeat and palpitations, as well as respiratory issues, including difficulty breathing. Overuse of the plant has also been linked to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and skin rashes, in some individuals. It is essential to use Gerascanthus gardneri under the guidance of a qualified medical professional or herbalist to minimize the risk of adverse side effects.
